opening_line: Hi - I read a review where Sachin mentioned quality workmanship on a job with Alexander’s Painters&Decorators. That stood out.
source_quote: Having our upstairs box room refurbished. Neil came over and firstly removed all the historic wall paper (layers of it) and then saved us money on a plasterer by carefully filling and sanding everywhere that needed it. He decorated the room fully, including the walls, ceiling, woodwork and the radia
why_this_angle: Lead with review detail about quality workmanship (Sachin)
suggested_whatsapp: Hi, Julius here. I build websites for local trades. One of your Google reviews from Sachin mentioned quality workmanship - I mocked up a one-page site around that. No obligation - want a quick look?

follow_up_replies.text: One-page site from £300. Includes mobile layout and quote form.
No problem - I will remove the preview. Thanks for your time.
